evidence_refs: WM-6: MonthlyView rewritten — overflow-y-auto removed; 4-week page chunk driven by activeWeek; each week row is flex-1 min-h-0 (no scroll, rows divide height equally); DayGridCard receives isMonthly=true which now uses h-full and renders MonthlyTaskChip mini-chips (expansion disabled); long-press on chip fires setFocusedNodeId opening Task Editor; grid naturally shrinks when editor opens (flex layout).
